verses.2: They cry to me, ‘My God, we, Israel, acknowledge you!’
verses.3: Israel has cast off that which is good.
verses.4: They have set up kings, but not by me.
verses.5: Let Samaria throw out his calf idol!
verses.6: For this is even from Israel!
verses.9: For they have gone up to Assyria,
verses.10: But although they sold themselves among the nations,
verses.11: Because Ephraim has multiplied altars for sinning,
verses.12: I wrote for him the many things of my law,
verses.13: As for the sacrifices of my offerings,
verses.14: For Israel has forgotten his Maker and built palaces;
